name: claw-machine-admin-desktop
author: Rivercom
description: Shell de escritorio para Máquina de garra

scripts.dist: npm run build:backend:win && electron-builder --config electron-builder.unsigned.yml --win nsis
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:backend:linux && electron-builder --config electron-builder.linux.yml --linux AppImage deb
scripts.dist:signed: npm run build:backend:win && node scripts/require-signing-env.js && electron-builder --win nsis
